content.query:
drop TABLE dim.provider_taxonomy_t;
CREATE TABLE dim.provider_taxonomy_t
	(
	 [category] nvarchar(20),
	 [code] nvarchar(20),
	 [taxonomy_classification] nvarchar(200),
	 [recode] nvarchar(20),
	 [recode_type] nvarchar(200),
	 [recode_classification] nvarchar(200),
	 [recode_specialization] nvarchar(100)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

--Uncomment the 4 lines below to create a stored procedure for data pipeline orchestration​
--CREATE PROC bulk_load_provider_taxonomy_t
--AS
--BEGIN
COPY INTO dim.provider_taxonomy_t
(category 1, code 2, taxonomy_classification 3, recode 4, recode_type 5, recode_classification 6, recode_specialization 7)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/dimension_tables/dim_provider_taxonomy.csv'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIRSTROW = 2
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dim.provider_taxonomy_t
GO
